column1: # EXAMPLE / TEMPLATE substrate panel — replace with real candidates for your enzyme.
# Format: name<TAB>SMILES   (lines starting with '#' are ignored)

# alternative substrates, (3) one or two negative-control decoys that should NOT
# be substrates. Look up canonical SMILES (e.g. from ChEBI/PubChem) — do not guess.
# The rows below are trivially-correct placeholder molecules ONLY to demonstrate
# the file format; they are NOT a real substrate set for any enzyme.
